summary: M2 pipeline lands — PCI enumeration, VFS, NVMe block driver, PondFS (RW), real ELF init, and an expanded syscall surface.
Warning-free build — kernel and bootloader now pass `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, plus a stable-feature and raw-pointer cleanup pass.
Boot path is sound again — fixes the HHDM-before-CR3 fault, a nightly build break, and several correctness landmines.
